recipe.name: agent-loop
recipe.description: Turn-by-turn agentic loop — the Claude Code / orchie pattern: system prompt, tool execution, context management, done detection, session persistence

pipeline.name: agent-session
pipeline.description: Full agent lifecycle: register servers → discover capabilities → init provider → agent loop → cleanup

steps.name: RegisterServers
steps.description: Boot MCP servers from hub config and register tool schemas

steps.name: DiscoverByIntent
steps.description: Match user prompt to registered capabilities via intent embedding

steps.name: Init${ai_provider}Provider
steps.description: Initialize the language model provider (start session, authenticate)

steps.name: AgentLoop
steps.description: Turn-by-turn loop — runs the turn pipeline until done

steps.name: InjectNotifications
steps.description: Drain the notification queue (user inject, tool backchannel, system alerts)

steps.name: ReadInput
steps.description: Prepare the next prompt: initial user prompt (turn 1) or follow-up/notification (turn N). Prepends system prompt directives (steer).

steps.name: ${ai_provider}LanguageModel
steps.description: Send prompt to LLM provider. Provider handles tool_use → execute → feed back internally until end_turn. Returns response + tool_results.

steps.name: ProcessResponse
steps.description: Parse response, classify turn type (user, tool_continuation, notification, rediscovery), record turn in state

steps.name: Backchannel
steps.description: Extract embedded notifications from tool results, push to queue for next iteration

steps.name: ToolContinuation
steps.description: Inspect tool results for __follow_up__ markers, set follow_up_prompt to trigger another turn

steps.name: UpdateIntent
steps.description: Detect intent shifts in agent output, update current_intent on state

steps.name: Rediscover
steps.description: Re-run capability discovery when intent changes mid-conversation

steps.name: ManageState
steps.description: Apply state updates (capability adopt/drop, context changes) after agent response

steps.name: ContextAttribution
steps.description: Track token usage by source (system, user, tool, history) for observability and budget

steps.name: ConversationRevision
steps.description: Compress older turns when token budget threshold is crossed (context compaction)

steps.name: SaveCheckpoint
steps.description: Persist session state after revision for resume capability

steps.name: ContextPruning
steps.description: Trim stale turn history and cleared response data to stay within context budget

steps.name: CheckDone
steps.description: Single authority for loop termination: no next_prompt → done, max iterations → done, already done → pass through

steps.name: SessionCleanup
steps.description: Shut down provider session, close MCP connections, flush audit logs

hooks.name: EventEmitter
hooks.description: Emit AgentEvent objects to the SDK event stream (attached to inner turn pipeline)

hooks.name: AuditHook
hooks.description: Capture structured audit events for compliance and debugging

hooks.name: TimingHook
hooks.description: Track per-filter execution time for performance observability

context_schema.max_iterations: int — safety cap for loop turns (default: 10)
context_schema.skills_paths: list[Path] — directories to scan for skill definitions
